title: Document dossier
subtitle: Secure documents, metadata, visibility and expiry monitoring for this employee.
noCloudTags: No active Cloud tags are available yet. Add them through Master data or Star Performers first.
uploadAdvanced: Only add extra visibility, tags and reminders here when they are really needed.
fileDropTitle: Drop a file here or choose a file
fileRules: Allowed: PDF, TXT, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, JPG and BMP. Maximum 25 MB.
visibilityDefault: Employee, direct manager and HR admin are enabled by default. You can also switch employee access off here.
employeeVisibilityAllowed: The employee can view this document.
employeeVisibilityBlocked: The employee cannot view this document.
reminderForEmployee: Also send the reminder to the employee.
noReminderRecipients: Choose at least one reminder recipient.
invalidType: This file type is not allowed. Use only PDF, TXT, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, JPG or BMP.
invalidSize: This file is too large. The maximum file size is 25 MB.
invalidInput: The document could not be saved. Check the file, title, category and reminder settings.
audienceRequired: Choose at least one audience that may view the document.
expiryRequired: Enter an expiry date before setting a reminder.
reminderTargetRequired: Choose at least one reminder recipient. For documents we only support employee and role recipients.
singleFileOnly: You can add only 1 file at a time.
empty: This dossier has no visible documents yet.
